concerns.detail: Personal attack using vulgar profanity 'sb' (stupid/asshole) and insult '狗腿' (lackey/bootlicker) targeting a specific student
concerns.excerpt: 其著名狗腿学生也是个sb

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment using profanity '吃屎' (eat shit) and insults '脑子有问题' (brain problems), '愚蠢' (stupid) targeting a professor
concerns.excerpt: 一个人脑子有问题他可以去干点其他事，他可以自己在家吃屎
